title: External Agent Write API — Note Event Payload (v1.0)
description: Payload shape for envelope.event_type='note'. Routes to vehicle_observations with observation_kind='comment', source slug 'agent-submission'. Use for free-form remarks that don't fit a structured event type. Tightened in WS-4 with optional classifier fields so notes carry enough metadata to be filterable without forcing a heavier event_type.

summary.description: Short headline (1–280 chars). Vision-fillable from a photo caption; context-fillable from chat scrollback.

narrative.description: Optional longer body for the note.

observation_type.description: Optional classifier so consumers can filter notes by intent without reading prose.

confidence.description: Agent's self-rated confidence in the note's accuracy. Reflects the quality of the source, not the agent's eloquence.

zones_mentioned.description: Subsystems the note refers to. Same closed enum as service.zones_touched so timeline filters are consistent.

photos_referenced.description: Caller-side identifiers (URL or sha256) of photos this note references.
